sentence: 早期殖民者到达后改变了当地的生活方式。
pinyin: Zǎoqī zhímínzhě dào dá hòu gǎibiàn le dāngdì de shēnghuó fāngshì.
english: After the early colonists arrived, they changed the local way of life.

sentence: 我们每个月要还房贷，压力不小。
pinyin: Wǒmen měi gè yuè yào huán fángdài, yālì bù xiǎo.
english: We have to pay back the home loan every month; the pressure is significant.

meaning: 1. to insult; 2. to humiliate; 3. to bully
sentence: 任何人都不应该遭受语言上的凌辱。
pinyin: Rènhé rén dōu bù yīnggāi zāoshòu yǔyán shàng de língrǔ.
english: No one should have to endure verbal humiliation.

sentence: 她考上了市里最好的音乐学院，全家都很高兴。
pinyin: Tā kǎo shàng le shì lǐ zuì hǎo de yīnyuè xuéyuàn, quánjiā dōu hěn gāoxìng.
english: She got into the best music conservatory in the city; the whole family was thrilled.

meaning: 1. clutch (in car gearbox); 2. separation and reunion
sentence: 学开手动挡时，踩离合的时机很重要。
pinyin: Xué kāi shǒudòng dǎng shí, cǎi lígé de shíjī hěn zhòngyào.
english: When learning to drive a manual car, timing the clutch is very important.
